Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sancations For Attorneys Fees Or For Alternative Sanctions
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN of Bornstein & Bornstein, Tel No. (415) 409-7611 appearing for Defendant;
No other appearances made in this case.

RULING - Defense counsel informs the Court that parties in this case have reached a settlement. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and orders off calendar PLAINTIFF FIRST MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Terminating Sanctions, For Attorneys Fees Or For Alternative Sanctions. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/LOT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sancations For Attorneys Fees Or For Alternative Sanctions
Off Calendar May-01-2015 Continued To May-21-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Samiere of Cashmere Law Group telephone number 415-710-5859 for Plaintiff.
Jonathan Bornstein of The Law Offices of Bornstein & Bornstein telephone number 415-409-7611 for Defendant.

Counsel for the Defendant did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. The tentative ruling was not adopted. PLAINTIFF FIRST MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Attorneys Fees Or For Alternative Sanctions is continued to May 21, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sancations For Attorneys Fees Or For Alternative Sanctions

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF FIRST MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Terminating Sancations For Attorneys Fees Or For Alternative Sanctions is continued to May 1, 2015 on the Court's own motion. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Set For Trial On Jun-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lorna Walker, Esq. of the Law Offices of Sweet & Walker PC, Tel. 415.334.1600, for plaintiff and moving party;
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. of the Law Offices of Bornstein & Bornstein, Tel. 415.409.7611, for defendant.

RULING: Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. Defendant's counsel provided the Court with a copy of his opposition. After hearing, the Court took PLAINTIFF FIRST MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lorna Walker, Esq. of the Law Offices of Sweet & Walker PC, Tel. 415.334.1600, for plaintiff and moving party;
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. of the Law Offices of Bornstein & Bornstein, Tel. 415.409.7611, for defendant.

RULING: Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FIRST MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents And For Sanctions is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party submitted a proposed order.) Judge Pro Tem: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
